PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?creatorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q16995516 wdt:P527 ?series .
  ?series wdt:P1344 ?celebrity .
  ?celebrity p:P2234 ?netWorthStatement .
  ?netWorthStatement ps:P2234 / wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount .
  ?netWorthStatement ps:P2234 / wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q2192528 .
  ?netWorthStatement pq:P585 ?netWorthYear .
  ?show wdt:P31 wd:Q5398426 ; wdt:P161 ?celebrity ; wdt:P170 ?creator .
  ?creator rdfs:label ?creatorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?creatorLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(xsd:decimal(?amount) = 7000000)
  .
  FILTER(YEAR(?netWorthYear) = 2016)
  .
}
LIMIT 1
